fixed_response.message_body: Page not Found! Please change your search criteria!!

attributes.user_data:
#!/bin/bash
yum update -y
yum upgrade -y
yum install nginx -y

systemctl start nginx
systemctl enable nginx

aws s3 cp s3://brijendra-2003-a2/files/index.html /usr/share/nginx/html/
systemctl restart nginx

mkfs -t ext4 /dev/sdb
mkdir /data
mount /dev/sdb /data
aws s3 cp s3://brijendra-2003-a2/files/index.html /data --recursive
